page: Vultr vc2-6c-16gb is a Cloud Compute virtual server configured with six Intel x86_64 vCPUs. The processor architecture allocates six physical cores with one thread per core. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, which provides a resource density of 2.67 GB of RAM per core.

Storage is provided via 320 GB of local NVMe SSD, delivering fast read and write speeds for local data access. This server does not include any graphics processing units (GPUs). For external connectivity, the instance is provisioned with one complimentary public IPv4 address.

The CPU resources on this instance are shared rather than dedicated. This shared allocation model offers a cost-effective hardware profile for workloads with variable compute demands, though it introduces potential performance variability during periods of high host contention.

This hardware configuration is suitable for general-purpose applications, software development environments, web serving, and small-scale database deployments that require moderate memory and fast local storage without needing sustained, dedicated CPU performance.
description: The Vultr vc2-6c-16gb is a Cloud Compute virtual server built on the Intel x86_64 architecture. It features 6 vCPUs and 6 physical cores with a single thread per core under a shared CPU allocation model. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.67 GB of RAM per core, and includes 320 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. No GPU accelerators are present. Network provisioning includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. Because the CPU resources are shared, this instance offers a cost-effective option for non-intensive workloads, balancing storage capacity and memory. It is suited for web serving, development environments, and small-scale database applications that do not require continuous dedicated compute performance.
og_description: Vultr vc2-6c-16gb is a Cloud Compute virtual server featuring 6 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and 320 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for budget-conscious general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A shared-CPU virtual server offering six Intel cores, sixteen gigabytes of memory, and fast local NVMe solid-state storage.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 2.67 GB per core
